articles.description:
Taco Bell has released its schedule of digital deals through mid-December 2025. As usual, the agenda includes Tuesday Drops, in-app deals, and third-party delivery deals. Interestingly enough, there is no free or discounted food as Tuesday Drops this round.

Here's what the schedule looks like for the next month or so:
Tuesday Drops


12/2/25 - Five College Football National Championship Ticket Drops courtesy of Dr Pepper are up for grabs from 2PM to 3PM PT. Each prize covers travel and accommodations for the winners and their +1s to attend the College Football National Championships in Miami, FL. 
12/9/25 - 300 Poblano Sweaters are up for grabs from 2PM to 3PM PT.
12/16/25 - 500 Feed the Beat Record Club boxes, featuring rock band Portugal. The Man, are up for grabs from 2PM to 3PM PT.


…
articles.title: Taco Bell Digital Deals Through Mid-December 2025

articles.description:
McDonald's celebrates the holidays this year with everyone's favorite humbug--The Grinch. Starting December 2, 2025, the new Grinch Meal will be available at participating McDonald's restaurants nationwide.

Available for a limited time, the Grinch Meal features the US debut of Dill Pickle "Grinch Salt" McShaker Fries, which includes a packet of tangy dill pickle seasoning, an order of fries, and a McShaker bag to shake them in. The Grinch Salt McShaker Fries are accompanied by a medium drink and your choice of a Big Mac or 10-piece Chicken McNuggets.
Also included with each meal is a pair of Grinch-themed socks decorated with messages from the Grinch. There are four collectible socks in all--each in a different color.
Photo via McDonald's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: McDonald's Reveals New Grinch Meal

articles.description:
Little Caesars debuts the new Stuffed Crunch Crust Pizza as a limited-time variant of its stuffed crust pizza.

It's available now through the Little Caesars mobile app and website ahead of a national launch for everyone, starting November 24, 2025, including Hot-N-Ready availability from 4PM to 8PM.
The Stuffed Crunch Crust Pizza features a toasted, cheese-stuffed crust brushed with buttery garlic flavor (the same as is found on the chain's Crazy Bread) and sprinkled with herbs and breadcrumbs.
The new pizza is available topped with cheese or pepperoni for $9.49.
For a limited time, Little Caesars is also offering its Stuffed Crazy Crust Pizza, an online-exclusive, stuffed-crust pepperoni pizza brushed with buttery-flavored garlic spread and sprinkled with Parmesan for $9.49. It's also available topped with just cheese.
Photo via Little Caesars.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Little Caesars Bakes New Stuffed Crunch Crust Pizza

articles.description:
Taco Bell launches the new Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla as its "reimagining" of a classic quesadilla.

Available now for a limited time, the Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla features grilled marinated steak, a three-cheese blend, new roasted poblano peppers, and Spicy Ranch, rolled up in a warm, flour tortilla.
It's available a la carte for a suggested price of $4.99. You can also get it as part of the $9 (may vary) Discovery Luxe Cravings Box, which includes a Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla, a Doritos Locos Tacos, a Crunchy Taco, Chips & Nacho Cheese Sauce, and a medium fountain drink.
Photo via Taco Bell.
Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla
Calories - 530
Fat - 28g (Saturated Fat - 14g)
Sodium - 1280mg
Carbs - 43g (Sugar - 5g)
Protein - 26g
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Taco Bell Serves Up New Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla

articles.description:
Jack in the Box welcomes several limited-time menu items, including the new Gremlins Midnight Meal, to round out 2025.

Inspired by the Gremlins movie, the Gremlins Midnight Meal costs $12 (may vary) and includes two Crispy Chicken Strips, two Tacos, Onion Rings, Halfsie Fries, new Midnight Sauce, a drink, and a Gremlins air freshener.
The late-night meal is part of the series that the fast-food chain is calling its "Munch Better Deals," which are "crave-worthy combos for every appetite, time of day, and budget." There's also a $7 Brunchie Meal and a $10 Lunchie Meal.
The Brunchie Meal includes a Breakfast Jack, hash brown, three French Toast Sticks with a maple syrup dip cup, and a small coffee. 
The Lunchie Meal includes a choice of a Double Jr. Jumbo Jack Cheeseburger or Really Big Chicken Sandwich, plus 10 Tiny Tacos, seasoned curly fries, and a drink. 
Other returning and new, limited-time menu items include:
- New Midnight Chicken Sandwich - A crispy-fried chicken breast filet, pickles, and new Midnight Sauce, served on a toasted brioche bun. Midnight Sauce is a sweet and spicy sauce that features the flavor of maple syrup and the heat of chili peppers.
- Classic and Nashville Hot Mozzarella Sticks - Breaded and fried mozzarella sticks available plain or tossed in Nashville Hot sauce. They're available in 4-piece and 6-piece orders.
- Meat Lovers Croissant - A grilled sausage patty, grilled ham, hickory-smoked bacon, a fresh-cracked egg, and American cheese, served on a warm, buttery croissant.
- 2 for $5 Sausage Croissants - Each sandwich features a grilled sausage patty, American cheese, and a fresh-cracked egg, served on a warm, buttery croissant.
- New Midnight Snack Shake - A vanilla shake mixed with M&Ms, salty pretzel pieces, mini marshmallows, and crunchy graham cracker crumbles.
The listed items are available now for a limited time through January 5, 2026, while supplies last.
Photo via Jack in the Box.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Jack in the Box Introduces New Gremlins Midnight Meal and More

articles.description:
Sonic is offering a limited-time promotion for its mobile app users, where they can get a free Coca-Cola, Diet Coke, or Coke Zero Sugar in any size, along with unlimited free customizations with any purchase.

They're calling it the "Free Coca-Cola Your Way." To take advantage of the deal, you'll need to pick the relevant offer in the "Deals" tab of the Sonic mobile app. Then, you choose your Coca-Cola and add any flavors and/or fruit to your liking.
Available flavors include Cherry, Sweet Cream, Twisted Lime, Vanilla, Green Apple, Coconut, Blue Raspberry Flavor Bubbles
Fruit options include strawberries, lemon, jalapenos, pickles, lime, and cherries.
The only add-in not included is Nerds candy.
The Free Coca-Cola Your Way offer can be used once daily through December 28, 2025.
Photo via Sonic.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Sonic Offers Free Coca-Cola with Customizations with Purchase

articles.description:
Domino's debuts the new Spicy Chicken Bacon Ranch Pizza as the latest addition to its Specialty Pizza lineup.

The pizza comes topped with grilled chicken breast, ranch, bacon, jalapenos, provolone, cheese made with mozzarella (AKA pizza cheese), and a drizzle of Buffalo sauce.
The chain is also offering a new $9.99 mix-and-match deal on medium Specialty Pizzas, including the new Spicy Chicken Bacon Ranch Pizza. Domino's offers 10 other Specialty Pizzas, including The People's Pizza-Deluxe (i.e., a "Supreme Pizza" at most other pizzerias), Philly Cheese Steak, Pacific Veggie, and more.
The price on the mix-and-match deal may vary; it costs $10.99 per pizza here in Los Angeles. You can opt for Handmade Pan or Parmesan Stuffed Crust for an additional charge.
Photo via Domino's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Domino's Debuts New Spicy Chicken Bacon Ranch Pizza

articles.description:
Wingstop introduces new Fiery Lime as its latest limited-time flavor for its various chicken offerings.

The chain describes the new, spicy margarita-inspired flavor as "a dynamic blend of refreshing lime and bold chili lime seasoning." It rates three flames out of five on the Wingstop heat scale.
Available nationwide for a limited time now, Fiery Lime can be ordered on any of Wingstop's wings, boneless wings, chicken sandwiches, and tenders.
Photo via Wingstop.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Wingstop Launches New Fiery Lime Flavor

articles.description:
Dunkin' has unveiled its 2025 holiday menu, featuring new and returning festive drinks as well as seasonal food options.

Here's what you'll find on the seasonal menu:
- New Cookie Butter Cloud Latte - Espresso, milk, and cookie butter syrup (featuring notes of brown sugar and baked cookie flavor), served over ice, topped with Cookie Butter Cold Foam and cookie butter crumbles. It's an iced latte version of the Cookie Butter Cold Brew, which was introduced last year but is also available this year.
- New Berry Sangria Refresher - Dunkin's first-ever holiday-themed Refresher consists of bright berry flavors mixed with your choice of green tea, black tea, lemonade, or sparkling water.
- Peppermint Mocha Signature Latte - Espresso, milk, and peppermint mocha sauce, topped with whipped cream, …
articles.title: Dunkin' Welcomes 2025 Holiday Menu

articles.description:
The French Dip sub is back at Firehouse Subs for a limited time.

Firehouse French Dip features "premium cut" roast beef, caramelized onions, melted provolone, and Italian seasoning, served on a toasted garlic bread roll. A side of hot aus jus is included for dipping.
Prices vary, but an 8-inch medium French Dip costs $14.99 at a location here in Los Angeles.
Photo via Firehouse Subs.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: French Dip Returns to Firehouse Subs

articles.description:
Denny's 2025 holiday menu has arrived, anchored by the returning Rudolph Pancakes, which are themed after Rudolph the Red-Nosed Reindeer.

The pancake is available on its own and as part of an Everyday Value Slam.
An à la carte order of Rudolph Pancakes features two buttermilk pancakes arranged to make Rudolph's head decorated with turkey bacon antlers, whipped cream dollops, chocolate eyes, and a strawberry for Rudolph's red nose.
The Rudolph Everyday Value Slam includes Rudolph Pancakes and two eggs. Prices vary, but the Slam is priced at $6.99 near me in the Los Angeles area, while the pancakes alone are $5.
As a holiday promotion, Denny's Kids Eat Free deal is now available every day, from 4PM to 10PM, for a limited time. Under the terms of the offer, you can get a free Kids Meal with the purchase of each adult entree when dining in at participating locations nationwide.
Other seasonal holiday items available now at Denny's include:
- New Cinnamon Apple Crisp Pancake Slam - Two buttermilk pancakes cooked with cinnamon crumb topping, topped with warm apple crisp, salted caramel sauce, and powdered sugar. The pancakes are served with two eggs, hash browns, and two applewood-smoked bacon strips or two pork sausage links.
- New Cold Brew Flavors - For a limited time, you can get cold brew coffee in three new seasonal flavors: 


Salted Caramel - Cold brew mixed with milk and caramel syrup, poured over ice, and topped with whipped cream and caramel sauce.
Peppermint Mocha - Cold brew mixed with milk and peppermint syrup, poured over ice, and topped with whipped cream and chocolate sauce.
Sweet & Creamy - Cold brew mixed with milk and cane syrup, poured over ice.


- New Peppermint Hot Chocolate - Hot chocolate mixed with peppermint syrup and topped with whipped cream.
Photo via Denny's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Denny's 2025 Holiday Menu Arrives

articles.description:
Dutch Bros readies for the holidays with the release of its 2025 holiday menu, featuring new and returning seasonal drinks.

This year's holiday menu is available now at all Dutch Bros locations for a limited time and includes:
- New Mistletoe Rebel - Raspberry and pomegranate flavors mixed with the chain's signature Rebel energy drink, and decorated with a green glitter glaze. You can get it blended, iced, or as a lemonade (a non-caffeinated option).
- New Holiday Cookie Freeze - Espresso, sweet cream, and vanilla, swirled with jingle sprinkles and finished with Soft Top and more jingle sprinkles. You can also get it as a shake or iced latte.
- New Jingle Nog Latte - Espresso and holiday nog, topped with Soft Top and jingle sprinkles.
- New Jingle Chai Nog - Chai and holiday nog, topped with Soft Top and jingle sprinkles.
- Hazelnut Truffle Mocha - A hazelnut mocha topped with Soft Top and a caramel drizzle. You can get it iced, hot, or as a Freeze. 
-  Candy Cane Mocha - Espresso, peppermint flavor, and chocolate milk, crowned with Soft Top and candy cane sprinkles. You can get it iced, hot, as a Freeze, as a cold brew, or as a hot cocoa. 
This year's holiday drinks come in one of six holiday-themed cups. Iced holiday drinks also come with a limited-edition straw.
Photo via Dutch Bros.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Dutch Bros Welcomes 2025 Holiday Menu

articles.description:
Krystal builds upon its recently updated Classic Patty Melt with a new, limited-time expanded Patty Melt menu.

Here's what the lineup looks like (with suggested prices listed):
- Classic Patty Melt ($5.79; also available in a combo for $9.79) - A 3-ounce burger patty, caramelized onions, and melted American cheese served on grilled, buttery toast.
- New Chipotle Patty Melt ($6.79; also available in a combo for $10.79) - A 3-ounce burger patty, caramelized onions, melted American cheese, jalapenos, and Hellmann's Chipotle Mayo, served on grilled, buttery toast.
- New Bacon & Egg Patty Melt (available all day for $6.99; also available in a combo for $10.99) - Bacon, a fried egg, American cheese, caramelized onions, and a 3-oz burger patty, served on grilled, buttery toast.
- New Chipotle Bacon & Egg Patty Melt (available all day for $7.29; also available in a combo for $11.29) - Bacon, a fried egg, American cheese, caramelized onions, a 3-oz burger patty, jalapeno, and Hellmann's Chipotle Mayo, served on grilled, buttery toast.
The new Patty Melts are available now for a limited time through January 11, 2026, at participating Krystal locations chain-wide.
Photo via Krystal.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Krystal Introduces New Expanded Patty Melt Lineup

articles.description:
Crumbl's weekly rotation of cookies and other desserts includes Banana Pudding and more this week.

Here's what's on deck at Crumbl for the week ending November 22, 2025 (I'm a bit surprised there isn't more of a Thanksgiving theme):
- Banana Pudding - Layers of banana, vanilla pudding, and vanilla wafers, topped with whipped cream and vanilla wafer crumbs
- Cookies & Creme Tres Leche Cake - A dark chocolate cake soaked in classic tres leches sauce, topped with whipped cream, and cookies & cream streusel.
- Peanut Butter Cup Skillet Cookie featuring Reese's - A warm peanut butter cookie topped with peanut butter cup mousse, a drizzle of melted milk chocolate, and Reese's Peanut Butter Cup pieces.
- Double Fudge Brownie Cookie - A warm brownie cookie topped with a chocolate glaze and brownie bites.
- Blueberry Pancake Cookie - A warm blueberry pancake cookie topped with a blueberry buttermilk glaze and a dollop of buttercream.
- Iced Oatmeal Cookie - A warm cinnamon oatmeal cookie covered in vanilla cream cheese glaze.
- Milk Chocolate Chip Cookie - A warm cookie packed with milk chocolate chips.
Crumbl also continues to offer a "Secret Menu," which is a cookie or other dessert chosen by each location. You can find what's being offered through the Crumbl website or mobile app.
Photo via Crumbl.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Crumbl Bakes Banana Pudding and More Through November 22, 2025

articles.description:
The Holiday Pie is back at participating McDonald's restaurants nationwide for the 2025 holiday season.

The seasonal treat features a turnover-style, baked pie with a creamy custard encased in a buttery, sugar-glazed crust embedded with rainbow sprinkles. You can find my previous review of it here.
Prices vary with location, but the Holiday Pie costs $2.49 or two for $4.25 at a local McDonald's here in Los Angeles. It replaced the Pumpkin and Creme Pie.
Photo via McDonald's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Holiday Pie is Back at McDonald's

articles.description:
Wendy's Snickerdoodle Frosty Fusion features a Vanilla (or Chocolate) Frosty swirled with new snickerdoodle sauce and topped with snickerdoodle cookie crumbles.

It cost me $4.19 for a small, and I went with the vanilla version.



Unlike a McFlurry or a Blizzard, the Frosty Fusion is only mixed for a few seconds (if that). The sauce remained mostly drizzled on the sides and bottom of the cup, resulting in a mild cinnamon note to the creamy Vanilla Frosty and a much sweeter, more pronounced cinnamon taste whenever the sauce was encountered. Interestingly, the sauce contained visible flecks of cinnamon.
The snickerdoodle cookie crumbles on top had the requisite mix of sweet vanilla and cinnamon flavors. They were super crunchy (although this experience may vary), providing a nice contrast to the smooth Frosty and liquid sauce.



Overall, I enjoyed Wendy's Snickerdoodle Frosty Fusion a good deal. I like snickerdoodles, and the flavor was captured well here. I especially liked the hearty crunch of the cookies on top as that can be hit-or-miss with this type of dessert.
